description: Surface and switch between versions of a page over time. Phase 1: inline data source + trigger + picker popover + navigate action. Modes auto-derived from data shape (releases vs history).

attributes.name: data-versions
attributes.description: Inline JSON array of version entries: { id, label?, url?, date?, author?, summary?, archived?, draft?, current?, versionUrl? }. Alternative: a <script type="application/json" data-versions> child.

events.name: version-switcher:select
events.description: Fires when an entry is selected (before the action runs)

events.name: version-switcher:before-navigate
events.description: Cancellable. Fires before location.href is set; preventDefault() blocks navigation.

childAttributes.name: data-versions
childAttributes.description: Marks a <script type="application/json"> child as the versions JSON source
